content.text: Guru Gobind Singh Ji was the tenth Sikh Guru, a spiritual master, warrior, poet and philosopher.
He founded the Khalsa in 1699, initiating the Panj Pyare and giving them the title of Singh.
He fought many battles against the Mughals to protect the oppressed and established a strong martial tradition.

revision_note: doc_id corrected 2026-07-22: previously 'dharam_veer_guru_gobind_singh' (underscored), which never matched the app's actual figure_id ('guru-gobind-singh', hyphenated, from src/lib/data/dharm-veers/sikh.ts). This hero's AI reflection feature was unreachable in production prior to this fix. Content itself (source_name 'Sikh History') was not re-verified in this batch and should be re-sourced to a named source (e.g. Macauliffe, The Sikh Religion, 1909, public domain) before being treated as fully policy-compliant.
